description: Creatures of the feywild — tricksters, nature spirits, and the beautiful and terrible fey courts.
creatures: Pixie
A palm-sized sprite with dragonfly wings that turns invisible and delights in bewildering travelers.
Sprite
A tiny, sword-wielding forest guardian that reads hearts and puts creatures to sleep with its arrows.
Dryad
A hauntingly beautiful woman who steps out of her oak tree to charm or warn trespassers.
Satyr
A goat-legged reveler whose panpipe music makes even the dour dance and drink until dawn.
Nymph
A breathtaking spirit of spring or grove whose unveiled true form can blind mortal eyes.
Treant
A moss-draped ancient tree that uproots itself to crush intruders and command lesser plants.
Faerie Dragon
A tiny dragon with butterfly wings that giggles invisibly and casts prank-like illusions.
Redcap
A squat, iron-booted fey that murders travelers and soaks its cap in their blood to stay alive.
Hag
A hideous crone who bargains in riddles, brews foul potions, and covets children.
Wild Hunt
A spectral cavalcade of horns and hounds that thunders through the night sky, claiming souls.
Brownies
Tiny household fey that mend shoes and sweep hearths overnight in exchange for a saucer of cream.
Boggart
A malicious shapeshifter that takes the form of whatever its victim fears most.
Will-o'-Wisp
A bobbing, ghostly lantern-light that drifts through swamps, luring the lost into deep water.
Seelie Court Noble
A radiant fey lord or lady who grants boons wrapped in impossible, binding conditions.
Unseelie Court Noble
A coldly beautiful fey aristocrat who collects mortal tears and trades in broken promises.
